description: You are preparing a field laptop for an atmospheric science team deploying to Railroad Valley, Nevada, to perform radiometric calibration of optical weather satellites. Configure GPredict with a ground station named Railroad_Valley (38.504 N, 115.694 W, 1435m altitude) and a tracking module named Vicarious_Cal. The Vicarious_Cal module must track SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), FENGYUN 3A (NORAD 32958), and FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214) specifically for the Railroad_Valley station using a List-only layout. Set the global pass prediction minimum elevation to 15 degrees and the display time to UTC. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
